text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 286 

PRE_ICL_TIER_DRUG_TYPE 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Drug Type by Tier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies what types of drugs, if any, are covered on each formulary tier during the pre-
initial coverage limit (ICL) phase. A tier may include multiple drug types. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 (starting in 2018, length is 2) 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: For 2007–2017 data —
